coordinate_system: HPRCv2 1Mb trimmed PanSN sequence coordinates; PHR region_start/end are 0-based half-open coordinates relative to each sequence; CHM13 original chromosome intervals are encoded in the sequence names
community: C7 arm-level Leiden community: chr13_parm, chr14_parm, chr15_parm, chr21_parm, chr22_parm
genes_repeats_to_display: PHR intervals; TAR1 markers; MTCO3P39/MTCO-family pseudogene labels where present; rDNA-adjacent C7 label; optional copy/community labels
talk_rationale: Minimum required acrocentric example. C7 is the rDNA-adjacent acrocentric p-arm community and is the strongest homogenization story; TAR1 is lower than other non-PAR arms but still present in 73-79% of acro p-arm sequences.
renderer_notes: Draw as a small-multiple stack, one row per acro p-arm, with a shared C7 color band. Use all-vs-all coordinates for chr13p because the repo-root CHM13 BED omits that row while the HPRCv2 1Mb projected table includes it.
